query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT e.id, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', p.sortOrder, NOW(), NOW()
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON c.establishmentId = e.id AND c.name = 'Hambúrgueres Gourmet'
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Angus Premium' as name, 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer angus 180g, queijo cheddar, cebola caramelizada e molho especial' as description, 38.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Blue Cheese Burger', 'Pão australiano, hambúrguer 180g, queijo gorgonzola, rúcula e geleia de pimenta', 42.90, 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Trufado', 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer 180g, queijo brie, cogumelos salteados e azeite trufado', 45.90, 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'BBQ Pulled Pork', 'Pão brioche, hambúrguer 150g, pulled pork, queijo cheddar e molho BBQ', 44.90, 4
) p
WHERE e.userId = 180577;
